title: 12 Industrials Stocks Moving In Wednesday's After-Market Session
content:
Gainers

Linkers Industries (NASDAQ:LNKS) stock moved upwards by 18.5% to $1.6 during Wednesday's after-market session. The market value of their outstanding shares is at $2.1 million. Masonglory (NASDAQ:MSGY) shares rose 8.37% to $0.47. The market value of their outstanding shares is at $6.3 million. Concorde Intl Gr (NASDAQ:YOOV) shares rose 7.84% to $0.74. The company's market cap stands at $231.5 million. Brenmiller Energy (NASDAQ:BNRG) stock moved upwards by 7.66% to $2.47. The company's market cap stands at $1.3 million. Samfine Creation Holdings (NASDAQ:SFHG) shares rose 6.69% to $2.55. The market value of their outstanding shares is at $10.0 million. Intercont (Cayman) (NASDAQ:NCT) stock moved upwards by 6.32% to $2.69. The market value of their outstanding shares is at $2.4 million.

Losers

Enovix (NASDAQ:ENVX) stock decreased by 11.8% to $6.43 during Wednesday's after-market session. The company's market cap stands at $1.5 billion. As per the press release, Q1 earnings came out today. Armlogi Holding (NASDAQ:BTOC) stock decreased by 7.02% to $0.29. The company's market cap stands at $15.1 million. The company's, Q3 earnings came out today. Icon Energy (NASDAQ:ICON) stock declined by 6.13% to $1.38. The company's market cap stands at $4.3 million. Perma-Fix Envirn Servs (NASDAQ:PESI) shares fell 5.31% to $9.19. The market value of their outstanding shares is at $203.6 million. Birchtech (AMEX:BCHT) stock fell 5.23% to $1.27. The company's market cap stands at $34.7 million. As per the press release, Q1 earnings came out today. SKK Holdings (NASDAQ:SKK) shares decreased by 4.98% to $3.8. The company's market cap stands at $11.2 million. title: Masonglory Limited Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Letter Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
content:
Masonglory Limited

Hong Kong, March 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Masonglory Limited (the “Company” or “Masonglory”) (NASDAQ: MSGY), a Hong Kong based subcontractor providing wet trades and related ancillary services to private and public sectors, announces that it received a notification letter from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (“Nasdaq”) dated March 13, 2026, notifying the Company that it is not in compliance with the requirement to maintain a minimum closing bid price of $1 per share, as set forth in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), because the closing bid price of the Company’s ordinary shares was below $1 per share for the last 30 consecutive business days (i.e. from January 28, 2026 to March 11, 2026). The Nasdaq Letter is only a notification of deficiency. It does not result in the immediate delisting and has no current effect on the listing or trading of the Company’s ordinary shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market at this time.

In accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(c)(3)(A), the Company has 180 calendar days, or until September 9, 2026 (the “Compliance Period”), to regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement. To regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, the closing bid price of the Company’s ordinary shares must be at least $1.00 per share for a minimum of 10 consecutive business days at any time prior to the expiration of Compliance Period. If the Company regains compliance with the minimum bid price requirement within the Compliance Period, Nasdaq will provide the Company with written confirmation and will close the matter. If the Company chooses to implement a reverse stock split, it must complete the split no later than ten business days prior to September 9, 2026 in order to regain compliance.

If the Company does not regain compliance by September 9, 2026, the Company may be eligible for an additional 180 calendar day compliance period. To qualify, the Company will be required to meet the continued listing requirement for market value of publicly held shares and all other initial listing standards for the Nasdaq Capital Market, with the exception of the bid price requirement, and will need to provide written notice of its intention to cure the deficiency during the second compliance period, by effecting a reverse stock split, if necessary. If the Company meets these requirements, Nasdaq will inform the Company that it has been granted an additional 180 calendar days. However, if it appears to Nasdaq that the Company will not be able to cure the deficiency, or if the Company is otherwise not eligible, Nasdaq will provide notice that its securities will be subject to delisting.

Story Continues

The Company is monitoring the closing bid price of its ordinary shares and evaluating options to regain compliance with the minimum bid price requirement, including by effecting a reverse stock split, if necessary. However, there can be no assurance that the Company will be able to timely regain or maintain compliance with Nasdaq’s continued listing requirement.

About Masonglory Limited

Founded in 2018 in Hong Kong, Masonglory Limited is a subcontractor providing wet trades services and other ancillary services to property developers and Hong Kong government. As a registered specialist trade contractor (plastering-group 2) since 2020, the Company provides customers with comprehensive wet trades works solutions, which principally include: (i) plastering on floors, ceilings, and walls; (ii) tile laying on internal and external walls and floors; (iii) brick laying; (iv) floor screeding; and (v) marble works. For more information, please visit: https://www.masontech.com.hk/; https://ir.masontech.com.hk/

Forward-Looking Statements

Certain statements in this announcement are forward-looking statements. These forward-looking statements involve known and unknown risks and uncertainties and are based on the Company’s current expectations and projections about future events that may affect its financial condition, results of operations, business strategy and financial needs. Investors can find many (but not all) of these statements by the use of words such as “aim”, “anticipate”, “believe”, “estimate”, “expect”, “going forward”, “intend”, “may”, “plan”, “potential”, “predict”, “propose”, “seek”, “should”, “will”, “would” or other similar expressions in this press release. The Company undertakes no obligation to update or revise publicly any forward-looking statements to reflect subsequent occurring events or circumstances, or changes in its expectations, except as may be required by law. Although the Company believes that the expectations expressed in these forward-looking statements are reasonable, it cannot assure you that such expectations will turn out to be correct, and the Company cautions investors that actual results may differ materially from the anticipated results and encourages investors to review other factors that may affect its future results in the Company’s registration statement and other filings with the SEC.

For more information, please contact:

Masonglory Limited

Investor Relations Department

Email: services@wealthfsllc.com

title: Catalyst Watch: Microsoft earnings, Boeing buzz, FOMC meeting, and fintech IPOs
content:
[Industrial sectors, financial services, food and beverage, banks, consumer goods, stock market information.]
Torsten Asmus/iStock via Getty Images

Welcome to Seeking Alpha's Catalyst Watch - a breakdown of some of next week's actionable events that stand out. Read more about the events that may impact stock prices next week.

MONDAY - JANUARY 26

 	* VOLATILITY WATCH - AppLovin (APP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/APP]) and Salesforce (CRM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CRM]) are set up for a volatile week of trading based on options volume. The most overbought stocks per their 14-day relative strength index include ImmunityBio (IBRX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IBRX]), Corvus Pharmaceuticals (CRVS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CRVS]), and Masonglory (MSGY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MSGY]). The most oversold stocks per their 14-day Relative Strength Index include Abbott (ABT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ABT]), Netflix (NFLX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NFLX]), and Diginex (DGNX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DGNX]). 
 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Nucor (NUE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NUE]), Brown & Brown (BRO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BRO]), and Crane Company (CR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CR]).
 	* IPO WATCH - Brazilian fintech upstart Picpay (PICS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PICS]) and insurance tech company Ethos Technologies (LIFE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LIFE]) are expected to price their IPOs and begin to trade. The IPO lockup period expires for certain blocks of shares of Ambiq Micro (AMBQ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AMBQ]) and Shoulder Innovations (SI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SI]).
 	* DIVIDEND WATCH - Companies that have an ex-dividend date coming next week include Clorox (CLX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CLX]), Paychex (PAYX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PAYX]), Costco (COST [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/COST]), and Morgan Stanley (MS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MS]).
 	* ALL DAY - Hecla Mining (HL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HL]) will hold an Investor Day event in New York City. Presentations will be made by the senior management covering strategy, finance, operations, exploration, sustainability, and innovation.

TUESDAY - JANUARY 27

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Boeing (BA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BA]), RTX (RTX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RTX]), Texas Instruments (TXN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TXN]), Union Pacific (UNP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/UNP]), Northrop Grumman (NOC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NOC]), UPS (UPS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/UPS]), General Motors (GM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GM]), and Kimberly-Clark (KMB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KMB]). Options trading implies a double-digit swing in share price for Seagate Technology (STX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/STX]) and JetBlue (JBLU [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JBLU]) after they report.
 	* ALL DAY - India Energy Week will kick off in Goa. The event is India’s flagship oil, gas, and broader energy exhibition and conference.
 	* ALL DAY - The all-stock merger between PotlatchDeltic (PCH [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PCH]) and Rayonier (RYN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/RYN]) will go to a shareholder vote. The New Gold (NGD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NGD])-Coeur Mining (CDE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CDE]) and SM Energy (SM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SM])-Civitas Resources (CIVI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CIVI]) deals also go to a vote.
 	* ALL DAY - Visa (V [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/V]) will hold its annual meeting. Shareholders will vote on typical board and corporate governance matters, though management may comment on strategy themes.
 	* 8:30 A.M. The S&P/Case-Shiller House Price Index will be released.
 	* 8:30 A.M. The New Home Sales report will be released by the U.S. Census Bureau.
 	* 10:30 A.M. Boeing (BA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BA]) will hold its earnings call. Updates on 737 MAX 8/9 output, the planned activation of the Everett North Line, and the timeline for 737-10 certification will be closely watched. Astronics (ATRO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ATRO]) derives 12% of its revenue from Boeing and trades in tandem with it following earnings 75% of the time.

WEDNESDAY - JANUARY 28

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Microsoft (MSFT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MSFT]), Meta Platforms (META [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/META]), Tesla (TSLA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TSLA]), ASML (ASML [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ASML]), IBM (IBM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IBM]), Starbucks (SBUX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SBUX]), General Dynamics (GD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GD]), and Las Vegas Sands (LVS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LVS]). Options trading implies a double-digit swing in share price for Brinker International (EAT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EAT]) and LendingClub (LC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LC]) after they report.
 	* ALL DAY - The Nevada Gaming Control Board is expected to release its gaming revenue report for December.
 	* 8:30 A.M. The December Durable Goods order report will be released by the U.S. Census Bureau.
 	* 2:00 P.M. The Federal Reserve will announce its interest rate decision.
 	* 2:30 P.M. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell will hold a press conference.
 	* 5:30 P.M. Microsoft (MSFT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MSFT]) will hold its earnings conference call. Key topics will include AI and Azure growth and margin forecasts, Copilot monetization trends, and AI capex spending. Options trading is pricing in a +5% move following the earnings release, which would be a bigger post-earnings swing than normal.

THURSDAY - JANUARY 29

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Apple (AAPL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AAPL]), Visa (V [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/V]), Mastercard (MA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MA]), Caterpillar (CAT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CAT]), Honeywell (HON [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HON]), Lockheed Martin (LMT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LMT]), Comcast (CMCSA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMCSA]), Altria (MO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MO]), and Deutsche Bank (DB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DB]). Options trading implies double-digit swings for Western Digital (WDC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WDC]) and Olin (OLN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OLN]) after they report.
 	* ALL DAY - Starbucks (SBUX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SBUX]) will hold a key Investor Day event.
 	* M&A WATCH - Shareholders with Kenvue (KVUE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KVUE]) and Kimberly-Clark (KMB [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KMB]) vote on the proposed $49B merger between the companies. Shareholders with REV Group (REVG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/REVG]) and Terex (TEX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TEX]) will vote on their planned combination.

FRIDAY - JANUARY 30

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Exxon Mobil (XOM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/XOM]), Chevron (CVX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CVX]), American Express (AXP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AXP]), Verizon (VZ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VZ]), Colgate-Palmolive (CL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CL]), and SoFi Technologies (SOFI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SOFI]). Options trading implies a double-digit swing for Charter Communications (CHTR [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CHTR]) after it reports.
 	* M&A WATCH - The Sealed Air (SEE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SEE]) sale to CD&R could be ruled on by the Competition Canada and European Commission. Sealed Air (SEE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SEE]) traded less than 1% from the deal price at the time of publication.
 	* ALL DAY - Church & Dwight (CHD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CHD]) will hold its Analyst Day event.
 	* 8:30 A.M. The December Producer Price Index report will be released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.
 	* 10:00 A.M. It is the government funding deadline.

MORE ON THE MARKETS 

 	* Markets On Thin Ice: Greenland Framework, Japan's Yield Shock, And A Fragile Tape [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4862253-markets-on-thin-ice-greenland-framework-japans-yield-shock-and-a-fragile-tape]
 	* Trump 2.2: Can The Market Keep Rallying In His Second Year Of Presidency? [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4862227-trump-2-2-can-the-market-keep-rallying-in-his-second-year-of-presidency]
 	* Will U.S. Q4 Growth Exceed Q3's Strong Pace? [https://seekingalpha.com/article/4862237-will-us-q4-growth-exceed-q3-strong-pace]
 	* Trump says U.S. negotiating 'total access' to Greenland - report [https://seekingalpha.com/news/4541935-trump-says-us-negotiating-total-access-to-greenland]
 	* Rick Rieder gains noticeable momentum in Fed Chair race, according to Polymarket [https://seekingalpha.com/news/4541674-rick-rieder-gains-noticeable-momentum-in-fed-chair-race-according-to-polymarket]

title: Catalyst Watch: Big bank earnings, major healthcare + retail conferences, Fedspeak flurry, CPI
content:
[Panoramic skyline of New York city at sunset, USA]
Nico De Pasquale Photography

Welcome to Seeking Alpha's Catalyst Watch - a breakdown of some of next week's actionable events that stand out. Read more about the events that may impact stock prices next week.

MONDAY - JANUARY 12

 	* VOLATILITY WATCH - AST SpaceMobile (ASTS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ASTS]) and Oklo (OKLO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/OKLO]) are set up for a volatile week of trading based on options volume. The most overbought stocks per their 14-day relative strength index include Amicus (FOLD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FOLD]), Shattuck Labs (STTK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/STTK]), and Dynavax (DVAX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DVAX]). The most oversold stocks per their 14-day Relative Strength Index include CVR Energy (CVI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CVI]), Lamb Weston (LW [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LW]), and AudioEye (AEYE [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AEYE]). 
 	* IPO WATCH - No significant IPOs are scheduled for the week. The analyst quiet period expires on Medline (MDLN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MDLN]), Andersen Group (ANDG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ANDG]), and Starfighters Space (FJET [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FJET]) to free up analysts to post ratings. The IPO lockup period expires for blocks of shares of Delixy (DLXY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DLXY]) and Masonglory (MSGY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MSGY]).
 	* DIVIDEND WATCH - Companies that have an ex-dividend date coming next week include AT&T (T [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/T]), Verizon (VZ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VZ]), Comcast (CMCSA [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CMCSA]), and Abbott Labs (ABT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ABT]).
 	* SPOTLIGHT ON ICR - One of the biggest retail conferences of the year will take place. The ICR Conference typically includes a wave of holiday sales updates and full-year guidance announcements. Notable companies participating include Walmart (WMT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WMT]), Urban Outfitters (URBN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/URBN]), Shake Shack (SHAK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SHAK]), Movado (MOV [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MOV]), and Yeti Holdings (YETI [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/YETI]).
 	* ALL DAY - The four-day JPMorgan Healthcare Conference begins in San Francisco. The conference is considered one of the most important of the year in the healthcare sector. Johnson & Johnson (JNJ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JNJ]), Novartis (NVS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NVS]), AstraZeneca (AZN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AZN]), Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BMY]), and Kodiak Sciences (KOD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KOD]) are some of the notable companies making presentations. FDA Commissioner Marty Makary will give a dedicated keynote talk on regulatory priorities, accelerated approvals, AI in drug development, and safety/efficacy standards.
 	* ALL DAY - The National Retail Federation's Big Show event will take place in New York City. BJ's Wholesale Club (BJ [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BJ]) CEO Robert Eddy, Dick's Sporting Goods (DKS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DKS]) Executive Chairman Ed Stack, and Abercrombie & Fitch (ANF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ANF]) CEO Fran Horowitz will be giving speeches or participating in fireside chats.
 	* ALL DAY - The USDA will issue its monthly World Agricultural Supply & Demand Estimates report. WASDE includes U.S. and world supply-demand tables for wheat, rice, coarse grains (such as corn, sorghum, barley, oats), oilseeds (notably soybeans), and cotton, plus some coverage of sugar and livestock.
 	* ALL DAY - Shareholders of Avadel Pharmaceuticals (AVDL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AVDL]) vote on the buyout offer from Alkermes (ALKS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/ALKS]). AVDL traded about 4% below the buyout price of $22.50 at the time of publication.
 	* 10:35 A.M. St. Louis Federal Reserve Bank President Alberto Musalem will speak on the U.S. economy and monetary policy before an MNI webinar.
 	* 6:00 P.M. New York Federal Reserve Bank President John Williams will give a keynote before the C. Peter McColough Series on International Economics event organized by the Council on Foreign Relations.

TUESDAY - JANUARY 13

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include JPMorgan Chase (JPM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JPM]), Bank of New York Mellon (BK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BK]), and Delta Air Lines (DAL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DAL]).
 	* ALL DAY - The three-day Needham Growth Conference features a long list of companies presenting, including PagerDuty (PD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PD]), Surf Air Mobility (SRFM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SRFM]), Bitfarms (BITF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BITF]), and Navitas (NVTS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/NVTS]).
 	* ALL DAY - It is the five-year anniversary of Affirm Holdings' (AFRM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AFRM]) IPO. The stock traded 67% above the IPO price of $49 at the time of publication.
 	* ALL DAY - Shareholders with Denny's (DENN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DENN]) will vote on the deal to be taken private by TriArtisan Capital Advisors (owner of TGI Fridays and P.F. Chang's).
 	* 8:30 A.M. The Consumer Price Index report for December will be released by the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics. Economists expect the core inflation rate to remain level at 2.7%.
 	* 9:00 A.M. The New Home Sales report will be released by the U.S. Census Bureau.

WEDNESDAY - JANUARY 14

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Bank of America (BAC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BAC]), Wells Fargo (WFC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WFC]), Citigroup (C [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/C]), and H.B. Fuller (FUL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/FUL]).
 	* ALL DAY - The Detroit Auto Show will include press conferences and model reveals from major automakers. The winners of the 2026 North American Car, Truck and Utility Vehicle of the Year Awards will also be announced.
 	* ALL DAY - OPEC will publish its monthly oil market report.
 	* 8:30 A.M. The U.S. Census Bureau is scheduled to release the November Retail Sales report.
 	* 9:50 A.M. Philadelphia Federal Reserve Bank President Anna Paulson speaks on the economic outlook before the Chamber of Commerce for Greater Philadelphia State of the Economy event.
 	* 2:00 P.M. The Federal Reserve will release its Beige Book Report. The report will summarize current economic conditions across the Fed's districts.
 	* 2:10 P.M. New York Federal Reserve Bank President John Williams will give opening remarks before an event organized by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York.

THURSDAY - JANUARY 15

 	* EARNINGS WATCH - Notable companies due to report include Morgan Stanley (MS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MS]), Goldman Sachs (GS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GS]), BlackRock (BLK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BLK]), and JB Hunt Transport (JBHT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JBHT]).
 	* ALL DAY - Costco (COST [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/COST]) will hold its annual meeting. Shareholders will vote on the usual director elections, auditor ratification, say-on-pay, and at least one shareholder proposal related to ESG/climate issues. There has been speculation that Costco (COST [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/COST]) may announce a special dividend this year.
 	* ALL DAY - Traders have their eyes on the release of the Cocoa Association of Asia's quarterly grindings report.
 	* ALL DAY - Bank credit card metric reports will be closely watched for signs that consumers are buckling to financial pressure. American Express (AXP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/AXP]), Bank of America (BAC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BAC]), Citigroup (C [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/C]), Capital One Financial (COF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/COF]), Discover Financial (DFS), JPMorgan (JPM [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/JPM]), and Synchrony Financial (SYF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/SYF]) are all due to update on credit card net charge-offs and delinquency rates for December.
 	* ALL DAY - Topgolf Callaway (MODG [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MODG]) will officially revert to its old name, Callaway Golf, following the sale of a controlling stake of the Topgolf business.

FRIDAY - JANUARY 16

	* ALL DAY - It is the last day before the FOMC blackout period ahead of the next meeting begins. Fed Vice Chair Philip Jefferson, Fed Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle Bowman, Fed Governor Michael Barr, and Fed Governor Stephen Miran all have talks planned.

_Seeking Alpha Editor Josh Fineman contributed to this story._

title: Masonglory Limited Announces Closing of the Underwriter’s Over-Allotment Option in Connection with its Initial Public Offering
content:
Hong Kong, July  24, 2025  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Masonglory Limited (the “Company” or “MSGY”), a Hong Kong based subcontractor providing wet trades and related ancillary services to private and public sectors, today announced that it closed the sale of an additional 225,000 ordinary shares of the Company, pursuant to the full exercise of the underwriter’s over-allotment option granted in connection with the Company’s initial public offering (“IPO”, together with such over-allotment closing, the “Offering”), at the IPO price of $4.00 per share, less underwriting discounts. As a result, the Company has raised gross proceeds of $900,000 in addition to the previously announced IPO gross proceeds of $6,000,000, before deducting underwriting discounts and offering expenses.

The Offering was conducted on a firm commitment basis. D. Boral Capital LLC (the “Underwriter”) acted as the sole underwriter for the Offering. CFN Lawyers LLC acted as U.S. counsel to the Company, and Loeb & Loeb LLP acted as U.S. counsel to the Underwriter, in connection with the Offering.

A registration statement on Form F-1 (File No. 333-283046) relating to the Offering, as amended, has been filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the "SEC") and was declared effective by the SEC on June 30, 2025. The Offering is being made only by means of a prospectus. Copies of the final prospectus related to the Offering may be obtained, when available, from D. Boral Capital LLC by standard mail to D. Boral Capital LLC, 590 Madison Avenue, 39th Floor, New York, NY 10022, or via email at dbccapitalmarkets@dboralcapital.com or by telephone at +1 (212) 970-5150. In addition, a copy of the final prospectus can also be obtained via the SEC's website at www.sec.gov.

Before you invest, you should read the prospectus and other documents the Company has filed or will file with the SEC for more information about the Company and the Offering. This press release shall not constitute an offer to sell or the solicitation of an offer to buy the securities described herein, nor shall there be any sale of these securities in any state or jurisdiction in which such offer, solicitation, or sale would be unlawful prior to registration or qualification under the securities laws of any such state or jurisdiction.

About Masonglory Limited

Founded in 2018 in Hong Kong, Masonglory Limited is a subcontractor providing wet trades services and other ancillary services to property developers and Hong Kong government. As a registered specialist trade contractor (plastering-group 2) since 2020, the Company provides customers with comprehensive wet trades works solutions, which principally include: (i) plastering on floors, ceilings, and walls; (ii) tile laying on internal and external walls and floors; (iii) brick laying; (iv) floor screeding; and (v) marble works. For more information, please visit: https://www.masontech.com.hk/; https://ir.masontech.com.hk/

title: Masonglory shares open higher in Nasdaq debut after $4/share IPO pricing
content:
Investing.com -- Masonglory Limited began trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market Thursday, with shares opening at $4.28, above the initial public offering (IPO) price of $4.00 per share.

The Hong Kong-based subcontractor, which provides wet trades and related ancillary services to private and public sectors, raised approximately $6 million in gross proceeds from its offering of 1,500,000 ordinary shares, before deducting underwriting discounts and other expenses.

Masonglory’s shares are trading under the ticker symbol "NASDAQ:MSGY" on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

The company has granted its underwriters an option to purchase up to an additional 225,000 ordinary shares at the public offering price, less underwriting discounts, within 45 days from the closing date to cover any over-allotment. The offering was conducted on a firm commitment basis with D. Boral (OTC:BOALY) Capital LLC acting as the sole underwriter.

This article was generated with the support of AI and reviewed by an editor. For more information see our T&C.
